flowstate 0.17.1
  • Reference
    • flowstate -- Structure

Package index

All functions

add.keywords.to.data()
Add [['keyword']] values to [['data']]
concatenate.flowstate()
Concatenate a list of flowstates
flowstate.transform()
Transform linear values
flowstate.transform.inverse()
Transform values to linear – inverse
plot(<flowstate>)
Visualize flowstate data
read.flowstate()
flowstate: read, parse, and store .fcs data
select_nonsaturating()
Create a column (logical) for selecting against saturating events
select_population()
Create a column (logical) for selecting scatter/population-specific events
select_quantile()
Create a column (logical) for selecting against events below/above a quantile range
select_singlets()
Create a column (logical) for selecting singlet (scatter pulse) events
spillover.apply()
Compensate flowstate[['data']] using values stored in flowstate[['spill']]
spillover.update.value()
Update the values of flowstate[['spill']]
split(<flowstate>)
Split a concatenated flowstate object into a list
subset(<flowstate>)
Subset flowstate[['data']]
write.flowstate()
Write a flowstate as a Flow Cytometry Standard file (FCS 3.1)

Developed by Nathan Laniewski.
